hero.title: Verifiable Policy. Deterministic Access.
hero.subtitle: We architect highly regulated government infrastructure. Applied Policy Systems fuses deep systems engineering with legal fortification and operational design, ensuring complex public sector deployments maintain strict federal compliance and mathematical fidelity.

challenge.label: The Architectural Mandate
challenge.title: Structural Logic Dictates Operational Reality.
challenge.text: Initial cloud migrations establish a necessary digital baseline for state agencies. The operational mandate is to now graduate these environments from static data repositories into deterministic, rules-based infrastructures. We provide the architectural interventions required to decouple monolithic systems—resolving data mathematically, mitigating federal audit exposure, and decoupling the manual workforce from systemic bottlenecks.
challenge.solution: We deploy verifiable policy engineering, strict API boundary constraints, and frontline change management to legally secure complex systems and automate administrative logic.

infrastructure.label: Holistic Oversight
infrastructure.title: Structural & Operational Interventions.
infrastructure.text: We deploy strict architectural constraints alongside frontline change management to force true agility within bureaucratic environments.

hero.label: Capabilities
hero.title: Systems Oversight & Policy Engineering
hero.subtitle: We provide targeted engineering oversight, legal fortification, and strategic advisory to state agencies advancing toward highly automated, deterministic operational models.

statutory.title: Verifiable Policy & Legal Fortification
statutory.text: We bridge the gap between deterministic engineering and administrative law. We deploy mathematical theorem provers to verify Rules-as-Code compliance, while conducting empirical 'Time Tax' audits to legally defend state policy choices and challenge unfunded federal mandates.

rulesEngine.title: Ethical AI Governance & Infrastructure
rulesEngine.text: We secure sensitive federal data and mitigate algorithmic harm. We deploy self-hosted cryptographic gateways for strict IRS Pub 1075 compliance, alongside rigorous 'ethics-by-design' guardrails like Pre-Mortem Analyses and adversarial Red Teaming to prevent historical bias.

sanction.title: Strategic Procurement & API Decoupling
sanction.text: We legally block vendor lock-in and align siloed funding. We engineer strict API constraints into state RFPs to force true modularity, while deploying a 'Venture Capital' funding model that braids federal seed grants with targeted civic philanthropy.

data.title: Frontline Operations & Human Capital Architecture
data.text: Technology is useless without human adoption. We architect professional state workforces, eliminating paraprofessional dependency. We deploy 'Frontline First' change management, empowering the frozen middle and building cross-agency coalitions to co-design systems.

sprint.title: Targeted Architectural Rescue
sprint.text: Rapid deployments to diagnose and patch critical structural flaws, cryptographic vulnerabilities, or logic failures in live environments.

advisory.title: Technical Expert Advisory
advisory.text: Long-term partnership acting as the State's Technical SME for federal audit defense, vendor oversight, and pre-legislative policy proving.

integration.title: Procurement & Coalition Bounding
integration.text: End-to-end consulting to engineer the parameters of massive state RFPs, guaranteeing strict modularity and organizing the funding stack.

hero.label: Research
hero.title: Structural Diagnostics & Audits
hero.subtitle: Authoritative analysis mapping the architectural constraints of public sector technology deployments, vendor interoperability, and federal compliance parameters.

adv1.title: Legal Fortification via Empirical Time Tax Audits
adv1.desc: Diagnoses how qualitative policy defenses fail post-Loper Bright. Outlines the deployment of empirical burden measurements to challenge federal mandates.

adv2.title: Abstracting Audit Risk via Sovereign Cryptographic Gateways
adv2.desc: Addresses the severe audit liabilities triggered by using commercial SaaS platforms for cross-enrollment. Provides the blueprint for self-hosted, compliant cryptography.

adv3.title: Bypassing Limitations with Formal Mathematical Verification
adv3.desc: Diagnoses the failure of traditional software testing to prove federal compliance. Details the deployment of mathematical models to simulate legislative changes.

adv4.title: The Failure of Paraprofessional Dependency
adv4.desc: Diagnoses the administrative collapse caused by volunteer-based service models. Outlines the architectural shift toward professional, certified state career ladders.

adv5.title: Reconstructing Error Variances for Empirical Audit Defense
adv5.desc: Evaluates how state agencies fail to effectively combat federal payment error penalties. Provides the architectural framework for proving systemic vendor flaws.

adv6.title: Defeating Vendor Lock-In via Strict RFP Engineering
adv6.desc: Diagnoses how Primes exploit functional RFPs to deliver tightly coupled monoliths. Outlines how to mandate strict API metadata boundaries to legally enforce decoupling.

hero.label: Operational Authority
hero.title: About Applied Policy Systems
hero.subtitle: Architects of Deterministic Public Sector Infrastructure.

founder.title: Founder Dossier
founder.intro: We diagnose and engineer the critical structural logic operating inside large-scale government architectures.
founder.p1: Applied Policy Systems was established to guide state agencies through the critical next phase of digital modernization: architectural decoupling. While foundational cloud migrations successfully digitize baseline operations, the resulting tightly coupled systems require targeted structural engineering to operate efficiently at scale.
founder.p2: We act as the strategic failsafe for State CIOs and Agency Directors. We fuse engineering standards—like Mathematical Policy Simulators and Sovereign Cryptography—with legal fortification and organizational design to untangle monolithic deployments, engineer strict API boundaries, and secure federal audit compliance.

vendors.title: Prime Integrators

m1.title: Foundational Digitization
m1.desc: Spearheaded initial cloud migrations for large-scale benefit systems, identifying the early signs of vendor-driven structural coupling.

m2.title: The Modernization Trap
m2.desc: Formulated the 'Modernization Trap' thesis after diagnosing $100M+ failures in state eligibility platform deployments.

m3.title: Mathematical Verification
m3.desc: Launched the first production mathematical simulators for legislative logic, proving RaC compliance via SMT solvers.

m4.title: Sovereign Cryptography
m4.desc: Architected cryptographic gateways to protect IRS Pub 1075 and HIPAA data within multi-tenant cloud environments.

m5.title: Venture Capital Government
m5.desc: Pioneered the 'Venture Capital' model for funding state architectural rescue through braided federal and philanthropic grants.

m6.title: Workforce Architecture
m6.desc: Expanding the core mission to include the professionalization of state caseworkers and the elimination of volunteer-based dependency.
